title: FriendsCraft 2
description: This is a modpack perfectly designed for just having fun with your friends on an server!
body:
![This is the logo of FriendsCraft 2.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/685610b3ce423d77dde28da1ddcef4bfe5ee5af8.png)

FriendsCraft 2
-----------------
Do you want to have a great adventure with your friends in Minecraft without the game being filled with hundreds of mods? Then this modpack is exactly right for you!
This modpack is aimed at keeping Minecraft mostly vanilla, but it adds some quality of life features, as well as improving and making the boss fights more difficult, making the adventure more exciting! 

_Friends are not included!_

Versions
-----------------
There are 4 versions of the modpack:
- **Standard**: This version is intended for players who only want to join a server with this modpack. All mods that are only needed on the server side are not included in this modpack.
- **Low Performance**: Like the client version, this version is intended for players who want to join a server with this modpack. However, this version is only suitable for players who do not have a powerful computer, as most of the mods to improve the game's graphics have been removed in this version.

Features
-----------------
This modpack contains many functions and mods. Here are the most important ones:
- Thanks to many performance mods, the game should run smoothly and you can also use shaders.
- With the help of **Simple Voice Chat**, you can talk to other players in-game and thus interact better with each other.
- With **NoEmotecraft**, you can use emotes.
- Now you can harvest faster with **RightClickHarvest** by simply right-clicking your crops. Tip: With a hoe you can harvest several crops at the same time.
- Build a simple and efficient shop where your friends can buy something with the help of **Universal Shops**.
- Create amazing armor stands with special poses through **Armor Poser**.
- Sit on all possible stairs just by right-clicking them using the **Sit!** mod.
- So that you are no longer easily killed by your friends, you can use **Defense** to activate a shield with which your friends can no longer attack you, but you can no longer attack them either.
- **Enderpack** gives you the opportunity to always have an Enderchest on your back.
- With **Genshin Instruments**, you can introduce your friends to your great music in Minecraft.
- With **Camerapture**, you can record the most important moments with a camera and then hang these pictures on the wall anywhere, e.g. on your friend's wall.
- Craft an invisible item frame using **Invis item frame**.
- You die? No problem, because with **Hardcore Revival**, your friends can revive you as long as they are with you.
- Your friends don't want to save you and you really die? Then **You're in Grave Danger** is just right for you, which spawns a grave with all your items at your death point.
- Store your XP in bottles with **Bottle Your Xp**, but be careful: when you use it you don't get the same amount of XP back!
- Combine your elytra and your chestplate with the help of **Armored Elytra**.
- Your elytra can now look as beautiful as your chestplate with **Elytra Trims**.
- Do you have to protect your chests from your friends? Now you can lock them, your chests and not your friends, with a trial key.
- Now you can store 4 of your tools in your belt with **Utility Belt** and not fill your hotbar unnecessarily.
- Exploring is now much more exciting, as **Tectonic** makes world generation more complicated and exciting.
- The Wither is too easy for you? With the help of **Withering Heights: Revamped Wither**, the Wither fight becomes much more difficult.
- Getting to the End is now also more difficult, as **End Remastered** adds new special Ender eyes that can spawn in all kinds of structures. (The Wither also drops one)
- **True Ending: Ender Dragon Overhaul** makes the Ender Dragon fight much more difficult with new attacks.
- After you have defeated the Ender Dragon, you can explore the new structures in the End through **Medieval Buildings [End Edition]**.
- Includes [Stay True Texture Pack](https://www.9minecraft.net/stay-true-resource-pack/)
- Includes [Vanilla Tweaks Texture Pack](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/)
- And much more...
